proof:
constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · -- Show that 39 is minimal
    intro x hx
    have h1 : 30 * x % 47 = 42 % 47 := by 
      simpa [Nat.ModEq] using hx
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h2 : x < 39 := h
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num at h1 <;> omega
failed_attempts:
constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    native_decide
  · -- Show that 39 is the least element in the set
    intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := hx
    by_contra h1
    push_neg at h1
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h ⊢
    all_goals omega

constructor
  · -- Show 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    native_decide
  · -- Show no smaller element is in the set
    intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := hx
    by_contra h'
    push_neg at h'
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h ⊢
    all_goals omega

constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    native_decide
  · -- Show that 39 is the least element in the set
    intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := hx
    by_contra h'
    push_neg at h'
    have h1 : x < 39 := by linarith
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h ⊢ <;> omega

constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    native_decide
  · -- Show that 39 is minimal
    intro x hx
    have h : 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := hx
    by_contra h'
    push_neg at h'
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h ⊢ <;> omega
successful_attempts:
constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · -- Show that 39 is minimal
    intro x hx
    have h1 : 30 * x % 47 = 42 % 47 := by 
      simpa [Nat.ModEq] using hx
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h2 : x < 39 := h
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num at h1 <;> omega

constructor
  · -- Show 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · -- Show there is no smaller element in the set
    intro y hy
    have h : 30 * y ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := by
      simpa using hy
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h 
    by_contra h1
    push_neg at h1
    have h2 : y < 39 := h1
    interval_cases y <;> omega

constructor
  · -- Show that 39 is in the set
    show 30 * 39 ≡ 42 [MOD 47]
    native_decide
  · -- Show that 39 is the least such
    intro x hx
    have h1 : 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47] := hx
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h1
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    interval_cases x <;> omega
